category_sources: source_facts.description says Perl tools for bioinformatics, genomics and life science; current_curation.category_path lists science.
display_name_sources: Official BioPerl FAQ uses the name BioPerl; source_facts.name is bioperl.
docs_sources: Official BioPerl FAQ describes BioPerl and directs users to HOWTOs; official Using Git HOWTO documents source checkout and repositories.
repo_sources: Official BioPerl Using Git HOWTO says to clone the core BioPerl package from github.com/bioperl/bioperl-live.git and identifies it as the core package repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official BioPerl FAQ describe BioPerl as Perl modules/toolkit for bioinformatics solutions; source_facts.executables lists bp_* command-line tools.
